Creative Innovation Lab.summary: Supports cross-sectoral innovation in the cultural and creative sectors, including new business models, tools and solutions that improve distribution, access, visibility and sustainability.

Culture Helps Solidarity - First call fo.summary: Funds collaboration projects that use culture and creative practice to support solidarity, inclusion and community resilience, often in response to crisis or displacement contexts.

Culture Helps Solidarity - First Call fo.summary: Provides individual grants for artists/cultural operators to deliver culture-based support and integration activities, strengthening inclusion and community cohesion.

European co-development.summary: Supports co-development between producers and creatives to prepare high-quality European audiovisual works for financing and production, including market readiness and partnerships.

European Film Distribution.summary: Supports distribution of European films to increase cross-border circulation, audience reach and market access across participating countries.

European Film Sales.summary: Strengthens international sales agents to market and sell European audiovisual works worldwide, improving financing, visibility and cross-border exploitation.

European mini-slate development.summary: Supports development of a mini-slate of European works by production companies, enabling portfolio-based development, scripting, packaging and market preparation.

European VOD Networks and Operators.summary: Supports networks and operators of VOD platforms to curate and promote European works, improve discoverability and expand audiences across borders.

Films on the Move.summary: Supports theatrical distribution and promotion campaigns for non-national European films, boosting circulation, audience development and cross-border access.

Networks of European Cinemas.summary: Supports cinema networks committed to screening a high share of European films and delivering audience development activities, including education and outreach.

Networks of European Festivals.summary: Supports festival networks to enhance programming of European works, professional collaboration and audience engagement, including innovation and sustainability measures.

NEWS - Media Literacy.summary: Funds media literacy initiatives to improve citizens’ critical understanding of media, counter disinformation, and strengthen democratic resilience.

SKILLS AND TALENT DEVELOPMENT.summary: Supports training and professional development to strengthen skills and talent in the audiovisual sector (production, distribution, marketing, new technologies, green practices).

Support for the implementation of the Eu.summary: Supports communication, networking and capacity building for European Heritage Label sites, enhancing visibility, education and citizen engagement with shared European heritage.

THE HUBS.summary: Supports networks/hubs that connect cultural and creative organisations, facilitating collaboration, capacity building, mobility and access to markets, including innovation services.

TV and online content.summary: Supports development and production of high-quality European TV and online content (series and formats), strengthening competitiveness and cross-border reach.

Video games and immersive content develo.summary: Supports development of European video games and immersive experiences, including prototyping, production readiness, distribution strategy and audience building.

ZMINA:Resilience Seed Funding.summary: Provides seed funding to strengthen resilience of cultural ecosystems, enabling rapid-response cultural initiatives, organisational stabilisation and community-oriented projects.

“Culture Helps / Культура допомагає”. Pr.summary: Small project grants for culture-based integration and community activities, supporting inclusion of displaced people and strengthening local cohesion through creative practice.
